title: Design System: CAOS - Credit Agent OS

display.purpose: Single focal answer only: verdicts, anchor metrics, or committee decisions.

body.purpose: Workspace cells, rails, panels, and tool copy.

label.purpose: Captions, ids, dates, ratings, and tabular financial metadata.

shadows.name: popover
shadows.purpose: Filters, menus, and compact floating tools.

shadows.name: paper
shadows.purpose: Report Studio and research document sheets.

motion.name: transition-caos
motion.purpose: Default state change timing for background, border, color, shadow, and transform.

motion.name: running-pulse
motion.purpose: Live/running state only; disabled under reduced motion.

components.name: Panel
components.description: The canonical CAOS frame: fixed header, bordered panel, focusable scroll body.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Committed action or active navigation state.

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action, filter chip, or compact tool command.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost{border:1px solid var(--caos-border);border-radius:6px;background:transparent;color:var(--caos-muted);padding:4px 8px;font:500 9.5px var(--font-mono),ui-monospace,monospace;transition:background-color 160ms ease-out,border-color 160ms ease-out,color 160ms ease-out}.ds-btn-ghost:hover{background:var(--caos-elevated);border-color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--caos-accent) 50%,var(--caos-border));color:var(--caos-text)}.ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--caos-accent);outline-offset:2px}

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Shared single-line field for search, chat, query, and scenario prompts.
components.css: .ds-field{display:grid;gap:4px;color:var(--caos-text)}.ds-field span{color:var(--caos-muted);font:500 8.5px var(--font-mono),ui-monospace,monospace;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase}.ds-field input{background:var(--caos-bg);border:1px solid var(--caos-border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--caos-text);padding:6px 10px;font:400 10.5px var(--font-sans),system-ui,sans-serif;outline:none;transition:border-color 160ms ease-out,box-shadow 160ms ease-out}.ds-field input::placeholder{color:var(--caos-muted)}.ds-field input:focus-visible{border-color:color-mix(in srgb,var(--caos-accent) 70%,var(--caos-border));outline:2px solid var(--caos-accent);outline-offset:2px}

components.name: Concept Nav Chip
components.description: Compact cross-concept navigation with inline SVG icon and active inversion.
components.html: Command
components.css: .ds-nav-chip{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;border:1px solid var(--caos-accent);border-radius:6px;background:var(--caos-accent);color:var(--caos-bg);padding:4px 8px;text-decoration:none;white-space:nowrap;font:600 9.5px var(--font-mono),ui-monospace,monospace;transition:background-color 160ms ease-out,border-color 160ms ease-out,color 160ms ease-out}.ds-nav-chip:hover{background:#99c2ff;border-color:#99c2ff}.ds-nav-chip:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--caos-accent);outline-offset:2px}.ds-nav-chip svg{flex:0 0 auto}

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Compact metric block for KPIs, model outputs, and covenant checks.
components.html:
5.2x
Net leverage
FY27e base

narrative.overview:
CAOS is a refined institutional terminal for buy-side credit analysts. It should feel calm enough for investment committee work, live enough for desk posture, and exact enough that every number reads as traceable rather than decorative.

The workspace is dark, dense, and single-mode. Density is earned with fixed panel chrome, aligned numerics, small labels, and restrained state color. The Report Studio and research documents deliberately invert the workspace into light paper: ink on cream, file-ready, and visually distinct from the live analytical surface.

CAOS explicitly rejects friendly consumer SaaS, oversized marketing dashboards, pastel card layouts, decorative gradients, glow effects, and raw terminal dumps. The product can be dense, but it must always be organized.
keyCharacteristics: Dense analytical hierarchy with a 32px panel header as the structural unit.
Color reserved for state, selection, seniority, and evidence lineage.
Mono numerics and small uppercase labels for desk-readable precision.
Motion only for live, running, selected, or changed state.
Light paper output only inside Report Studio and research deliverables.

rules.name: The Signal-Only Color Rule
rules.body: Accent and semantic colors are forbidden as decoration. They mean action, selection, status, seniority, or lineage.

rules.name: The Dark Workspace Rule
rules.body: Analytical surfaces stay in the dark single-mode palette. Light surfaces are reserved for filed output and research paper views.

rules.name: The Numeric Truth Rule
rules.body: Financial values, ids, ratings, dates, and confidence scores use mono tabular styling so columns scan and decimals align.

rules.name: The No Display Labels Rule
rules.body: Product labels, buttons, table headers, and nav chips never use display sizing or decorative typography.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Floating Rule
rules.body: A resting panel gets a border, not a shadow. Shadow means the object floats above the workflow.

dos: Do use workspace-bg, panel, elevated, and border as the core surface ladder.
Do keep dense financial values in mono tabular type.
Do pair every semantic color with a label, glyph, or spatial convention.
Do use the shared Panel, TextInput, ScopeToggle, StatusGlyph, and ConceptNav patterns before inventing new chrome.
Do honor reduced motion. Running pulse and flash cues must stop under prefers-reduced-motion.
Do reserve Paper Surface and Paper Ink for Report Studio and research deliverables.
donts: Don't drift toward friendly consumer SaaS.
Don't add decorative gradients, glow effects, or glassmorphism.
Don't ship raw terminal dumps. Density must stay organized.
Don't encode status or tranche meaning by color alone.
Don't use emoji in product chrome.
Don't add shadows to ordinary panels or cards.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, huge rounded cards, or identical decorative card grids.
